scripts.test:browser: bun run test:e2e && bun run test:accessibility
scripts.test:e2e: bun run build:extension && playwright test --config playwright.config.ts testing/e2e
scripts.test:accessibility: bun run build:extension && playwright test --config playwright.config.ts testing/accessibility
scripts.verify: bun run lint:ts && bun run typecheck:ts && bun run verify:python && bun run verify:browser && python3 -m tools.verify.main --checks shape,docs,commentary,governance,headers,security,html_ship,adr,workflows,suppressions,commit
scripts.lint: bun run lint:ts && bun run lint:py
scripts.lint:ts: biome check package.json tsconfig.json playwright.config.ts apps packages tools/ts testing/e2e testing/ui testing/accessibility .github
scripts.lint:py: bun run deps:app && python3 -m ruff check apps/api apps/ingest python/common python/evaluation tools testing
scripts.typecheck: bun run typecheck:ts && bun run typecheck:py
scripts.typecheck:py: bun run deps:app && python3 -m pyright apps/api apps/ingest python/common python/evaluation tools testing
scripts.test:unit: bun run deps:app && python3 -m unittest discover -s testing/unit -p 'test_*.py' -t .
scripts.test:contract: bun run deps:app && python3 -m unittest discover -s testing/contract -p 'test_*.py' -t .
scripts.test: bun run test:unit && bun run test:contract
scripts.verify:python: bun run deps:app && python3 -m ruff check apps/api apps/ingest python/common python/evaluation tools testing && python3 -m pyright apps/api apps/ingest python/common python/evaluation tools testing && python3 -m unittest discover -s testing/unit -p 'test_*.py' -t . && python3 -m unittest discover -s testing/contract -p 'test_*.py' -t .
scripts.check:py:fast: python3 -m ruff check apps/api apps/ingest python/common python/evaluation tools testing && python3 -m pyright apps/api apps/ingest python/common python/evaluation tools testing && python3 -m unittest discover -s testing/unit -p 'test_*.py' -t . && python3 -m unittest discover -s testing/contract -p 'test_*.py' -t .
scripts.check:fast: bun run lint:ts && bun run typecheck:ts && bun run check:py:fast && bun run verify:browser && python3 -m tools.verify.main --checks shape,docs,commentary,governance,headers,security,html_ship,adr,workflows,suppressions,commit
scripts.ready:push: bun run verify && python3 -m tools.dev.sync_environment sync
